objective: Support the April 6 carousel with a calmer definition-first hook, a daily-life translation frame, and a clear route back to the feed post
visual_engine: image-led opener + structured editorial support frames
source_lane: Nano-Banana-source-image for frame 1 opener plate + design-first-no-image for frames 2 and 3
source_strategy: generate one calm editorial Nano Banana opener plate with protected upper-left copy space, then assemble the set in the compositor with the locked story card system
fallback_source: fallback to a clean text-led opener only if the Nano Banana image plate fails the calm-editorial or text-safe-zone review
visual_intent: fast mobile readability with calm atmosphere
brand_guardrails: preserve top and bottom safe zones
keep the full set lighter than the feed carousel
avoid internal labels, Set names, or template residue
do not add fake buttons, poll boxes, or sticker UI
frame 3 should feel like a route back to the feed, not another lesson
any image used must protect the text zone and avoid visual conflict with the typography
composition: frame 1 uses a calm image-backed opening with protected upper-left copy space
frame 2 translates the idea into daily-life reading
frame 3 routes back to the feed with one clear support card
cool-focus mist-blue and cloud-white structure with restrained apricot signal

text_overlay.headline_ja:

slides_ja:

notes: This is a support Story, not a smaller carousel. Use one image-led opener only if it materially improves the set, then let the rest stay structured, calm, and route back to the feed.
